title: taraxacum elaverinum
intro: Taraxacum elaverinum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum elaverinum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum elaverinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
